mapper.select: /** CmmtMemberDayStatsDao.selectTotalMbrCnt */ select b.member_type ,COALESCE(a.cnt, 0) as cnt from ( select member_type ,count(*) as cnt from cmmt_member where member_st != 'SECESSION' and created_dt <= to_timestamp(#{ymd} || '235959', 'yyyymmddhh24miss') group by member_type ) a right join (select code as member_type from cmmt_code where code_group = 'MEMBER_TYPE' and code_type = 'PORTAL') b on (a.member_type = b.member_type )

/** CmmtMemberDayStatsDao.selectJoinMbrCnt */ select b.member_type ,COALESCE(a.cnt, 0) as cnt from ( select member_type ,count(*) as cnt from cmmt_member where member_st != 'SECESSION' and created_dt between to_timestamp(#{ymd} || '000000', 'yyyymmddhh24miss') and to_timestamp(#{ymd} || '235959', 'yyyymmddhh24miss') group by member_type ) a right join (select code as member_type from cmmt_code where code_group = 'MEMBER_TYPE' and code_type = 'PORTAL') b on (a.member_type = b.member_type )

/** CmmtMemberDayStatsDao.selectSecessionMbrCnt */ select b.member_type ,COALESCE(a.cnt, 0) as cnt from ( select member_type ,count(*) as cnt from cmmt_member where member_st = 'SECESSION' and member_st_dt between to_timestamp(#{ymd} || '000000', 'yyyymmddhh24miss') and to_timestamp(#{ymd} || '235959', 'yyyymmddhh24miss') group by member_type ) a right join (select code as member_type from cmmt_code where code_group = 'MEMBER_TYPE' and code_type = 'PORTAL') b on (a.member_type = b.member_type )

/** CmmtMemberDayStatsDao.selectDormantMbrCnt */ select b.member_type ,COALESCE(a.cnt, 0) as cnt from ( select member_type ,count(*) as cnt from cmmt_member where member_st = 'DORMANT' and member_st_dt between to_timestamp(#{ymd} || '000000', 'yyyymmddhh24miss') and to_timestamp(#{ymd} || '235959', 'yyyymmddhh24miss') group by member_type ) a right join (select code as member_type from cmmt_code where code_group = 'MEMBER_TYPE' and code_type = 'PORTAL') b on (a.member_type = b.member_type )

/** CmmtMemberDayStatsDao.selectBlackMbrCnt */ select b.member_type ,COALESCE(a.cnt, 0) as cnt from ( select member_type ,count(*) as cnt from cmmt_member where member_st = 'BLACK' and member_st_dt between to_timestamp(#{ymd} || '000000', 'yyyymmddhh24miss') and to_timestamp(#{ymd} || '235959', 'yyyymmddhh24miss') group by member_type ) a right join (select code as member_type from cmmt_code where code_group = 'MEMBER_TYPE' and code_type = 'PORTAL') b on (a.member_type = b.member_type )
